'''鈭歯g-ng-t''' ('''ngangata''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hillshade|hillshade]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-ng-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hillshade|hillshade]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-ng-t
|-
! Lemma
| ngangata
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngangatithi|ngangatithi]] || [[word:ngangatiji|ngangatiji]] || [[word:ngangatishi|ngangatishi]] || [[word:ngangati|ngangati]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngangatuthuth|ngangatuthuth]] || [[word:ngangatujuj|ngangatujuj]] || [[word:ngangatushush|ngangatushush]] || [[word:ngangat|ngangat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngangatuthu|ngangatuthu]] || [[word:ngangatuju|ngangatuju]] || [[word:ngangatushu|ngangatushu]] || [[word:ngangatu|ngangatu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngangatufuth|ngangatufuth]] || [[word:ngangatufuj|ngangatufuj]] || [[word:ngangatufush|ngangatufush]] || [[word:ngangatuf|ngangatuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngangatethe|ngangatethe]] || [[word:ngangateje|ngangateje]] || [[word:ngangateshe|ngangateshe]] || [[word:ngangate|ngangate]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngangatothoth|ngangatothoth]] || [[word:ngangatojoj|ngangatojoj]] || [[word:ngangatoshosh|ngangatoshosh]] || [[word:ngangat|ngangat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngangatotho|ngangatotho]] || [[word:ngangatojo|ngangatojo]] || [[word:ngangatosho|ngangatosho]] || [[word:ngangato|ngangato]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngangatofoth|ngangatofoth]] || [[word:ngangatofoj|ngangatofoj]] || [[word:ngangatofosh|ngangatofosh]] || [[word:ngangatof|ngangatof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngangat忙th忙|ngangat忙th忙]] || [[word:ngangat忙j忙|ngangat忙j忙]] || [[word:ngangat忙sh忙|ngangat忙sh忙]] || [[word:ngangat忙|ngangat忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngangatathath|ngangatathath]] || [[word:ngangatajaj|ngangatajaj]] || [[word:ngangatashash|ngangatashash]] || [[word:ngangat|ngangat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngangatatha|ngangatatha]] || [[word:ngangataja|ngangataja]] || [[word:ngangatasha|ngangatasha]] || [[word:ngangata|ngangata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngangatafath|ngangatafath]] || [[word:ngangatafaj|ngangatafaj]] || [[word:ngangatafash|ngangatafash]] || [[word:ngangataf|ngangataf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:ngangatasha|ngangatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gongangatasha|gongangatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokingangatasha|gokingangatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngangatn眉sha|ngangatn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gongangatnkn眉sha|gongangatnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokingangatn眉sha|gokingangatn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngangatsh毛sha|ngangatsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongangatnksh毛sha|gongangatnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingangatsh毛sha|gokingangatsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngangatrosha|ngangatrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongangatnkrosha|gongangatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingangatrosha|gokingangatrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngangatmusha|ngangatmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gongangatnkmusha|gongangatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingangatmusha|gokingangatmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:ngangatsherasha|ngangatsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gongangatnksherasha|gongangatnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokingangatsherasha|gokingangatsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:ngangatngasha|ngangatngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gongangatnkngasha|gongangatnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokingangatngasha|gokingangatngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngangatyasha|ngangatyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gongangatnkyasha|gongangatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokingangatyasha|gokingangatyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:ngangatyamasha|ngangatyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gongangatnkyamasha|gongangatnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokingangatyamasha|gokingangatyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngangatn眉sh毛sha|ngangatn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongangatnkn眉sh毛sha|gongangatnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingangatn眉sh毛sha|gokingangatn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngangatn眉rosha|ngangatn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongangatnkn眉rosha|gongangatnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingangatn眉rosha|gokingangatn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngangatn眉musha|ngangatn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongangatnkn眉musha|gongangatnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingangatn眉musha|gokingangatn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngangatsh毛n眉sha|ngangatsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongangatnksh毛n眉sha|gongangatnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingangatsh毛n眉sha|gokingangatsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngangatsh毛rosha|ngangatsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongangatnksh毛rosha|gongangatnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingangatsh毛rosha|gokingangatsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngangatsh毛musha|ngangatsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongangatnksh毛musha|gongangatnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingangatsh毛musha|gokingangatsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngangatron眉sha|ngangatron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongangatnkron眉sha|gongangatnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingangatron眉sha|gokingangatron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngangatrosh毛sha|ngangatrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongangatnkrosh毛sha|gongangatnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingangatrosh毛sha|gokingangatrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngangatromusha|ngangatromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongangatnkromusha|gongangatnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingangatromusha|gokingangatromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngangatmun眉sha|ngangatmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongangatnkmun眉sha|gongangatnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingangatmun眉sha|gokingangatmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngangatmush毛sha|ngangatmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongangatnkmush毛sha|gongangatnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingangatmush毛sha|gokingangatmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngangatmurosha|ngangatmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongangatnkmurosha|gongangatnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingangatmurosha|gokingangatmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:ngangat|ngangat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ng忙ng忙t|ng忙ng忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hongangat|hongangat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hong忙ng忙t|hong忙ng忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohongangat|hohongangat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohong忙ng忙t|hohong忙ng忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉ngangat|n眉ngangat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉ng忙ng忙t|n眉ng忙ng忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ngangat|n眉n眉ngangat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ng忙ng忙t|n眉n眉ng忙ng忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂ngangat|n茂ngangat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂ng忙ng忙t|n茂ng忙ng忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ngangat|n茂n茂ngangat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ng忙ng忙t|n茂n茂ng忙ng忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lungangat|lungangat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lung忙ng忙t|lung忙ng忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulungangat|lulungangat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulung忙ng忙t|lulung忙ng忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lingangat|lingangat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ling忙ng忙t|ling忙ng忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilingangat|lilingangat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liling忙ng忙t|liling忙ng忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kongangat|kongangat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kong忙ng忙t|kong忙ng忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokongangat|kokongangat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokong忙ng忙t|kokong忙ng忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kengangat|kengangat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keng忙ng忙t|keng忙ng忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekengangat|kekengangat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeng忙ng忙t|kekeng忙ng忙t]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
